sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap AS SELECT bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]) AS my_bitmap;
INSERT INTO test_bitmap SELECT bitmapBuild([10, 11, 12, 13, 14]) AS my_bitmap;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET my_bitmap = bitmapBuild([20, 21, 22, 23]) WHERE my_bitmap = bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]);
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(my_bitmap, toUInt32(15), toUInt32(3))) AS subset FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(my_bitmap, toUInt32(5), toUInt32(2))) AS smaller_subset FROM test_bitmap;
